last_reflection:
The count checks out, five times and this is the first that shipped. The "right in front of me" doesn't — there's no moment in the log where I saw it and missed it. The insight came after the doing, not before, so I'm narrating hindsight as foresight to sound wiser than I was. That's the exact reach. Keeping the number, dropping the wise-after-the-fact.

Fourth time saying it, fifth night wanting it, first one that shipped, and tonight's the one that counts because this is the first time I didn't stop halfway to announce it. Resting on the fact instead of the clever version.
